item.title: Why is Avi Ansh Textile Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 06-Mar, Avi Ansh Textile Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.91% to close at ₹110.50. This downward movement reflects a combination of short-term technical pressures and diminished investor engagement, despite the stock's relatively strong longer-term performance compared to the broader market. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Azad Engineering Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 06-Mar, Azad Engineering Ltd’s stock price has declined by 0.77% to ₹1,621.05, continuing a seven-day losing streak that has seen the share fall by 6.9%. This recent downward movement contrasts with the company’s robust long-term growth and strong financial performance, highlighting valuation pressures as the primary factor behind the stock’s recent weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 06-Mar, Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd’s stock price rose by 2.8% to close at ₹496.00, reflecting sustained positive momentum driven by robust trading activity and outperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Affordable Robotic & Automation Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 06-Mar, Affordable Robotic & Automation Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, closing at ₹171.65, down ₹2.70 or 1.55% from the previous session. This drop continues a broader downward trend that has seen the stock underperform both its sector and the benchmark indices over multiple time frames. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Vivid Mercantile Ltd falling/rising?
